_comment: Official PostHog MCP server via the mcp-remote shim to the hosted endpoint. Read-only is enforced by a READ-SCOPED personal API key — see SETUP.md. Do NOT use the 'mcp_server' key preset (it includes feature_flag:write). Provide the POSTHOG_AUTH_HEADER env var (an Authorization header value built from a read-scoped personal API key) via the environment, never committed config. EU accounts: use https://mcp-eu.posthog.com/mcp. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
